deviations_from_prior_expectations.impact: Agent context cannot verify CUDA; not treated as proven host regression. Mandatory GPU inference smoke before Stage 5.
MVP schema Parquet I/O cannot proceed without later install (not done in Stage 0)
No in-env test/lint CLI; repo also has empty tests/

cuda_first_audit_20260722_1615.note: Initial Stage 0 audit snapshot before WSL-semantics correction

snapshot.nvidia_smi: Failed to initialize NVML: GPU access blocked by the operating system
notes: Previous reports (2026-07-10/12) recorded CUDA available=True on RTX 3050 4GB.
This Stage 0 audit session cannot access GPU device nodes; torch.cuda.is_available()=False.
Package builds remain cu128; runtime GPU access is blocked at OS/device level in this session.
Treat as Stage 1+ blocker until nvidia-smi and torch CUDA are re-verified interactively.

gpu_validation.note_on_nvidia_device_nodes: Absence of /dev/nvidia* is NOT by itself evidence of WSL CUDA failure; WSL2 typically uses /dev/dxg and /usr/lib/wsl/lib for GPU paravirtualization.
gpu_validation.wsl_nvidia_smi_status: FAILED_IN_AGENT_CONTEXT: GPU access blocked by the operating system
gpu_validation.windows_nvidia_smi_status: NOT_EXECUTABLE_FROM_AGENT_CONTEXT: WSL interop connect failed when launching Windows nvidia-smi.exe / powershell.exe
gpu_validation.historical_evidence: 2026-07-10 PC setup report and 2026-07-12 check_env: CUDA available=True, device NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Laptop GPU, 4GB VRAM, driver visible via nvidia-smi
gpu_validation.interpretation: GPU durumu Agent çalışma bağlamından doğrulanamadı. Önceki başarılı WSL testi geçerli tarihsel kanıttır; GPU, Aşama 5 başlamadan önce gerçek inference smoke testiyle yeniden doğrulanacaktır. Bu oturumdan sistem/GPU arızası sonucu çıkarılamaz.
